reviewer: orbit-agent self-review (figure-critic subagent not spawned in this workflow)

fit.png.notes: Clean one-panel fit with scatter + posterior mean + 95% credible band + true-target reference. Inline metric + fitted noise sigma. 200 DPI, >1500px wide, ~210 KB.

residuals.png.notes: Two-panel: residual-vs-x scatter with the true noise band shaded, plus a 12-bin histogram. Zero-residual reference dashed. Suptitle at y=1.05 does not collide with subplot titles. ~100 KB, 200 DPI.

results.png.notes: Left: log-scale bars (baseline / target / GP) with numbers labelled on each bar. Right: per-seed MSE bars with target and mean reference lines. Matches research/style.md palette.

narrative.png.notes: Three-panel baseline (constant / linear / GP) on shared y-axis with identical training data, true target, and predictions. Inline MSE per panel. Reads left-to-right as 'blunt -> sharp'.

problem: Symbolic regression (noisy): 50 train points with sigma=0.05 Gaussian noise on x in [-5, 5]. Test MSE (minimise) on a clean 500-point grid. Target = 0.01.
